title: Core Computational Thinking Skills
source_outline: Decomposition: breaking a big problem into smaller solvable parts; building a task tree
Abstraction: hiding complexity at the right level; choosing what to ignore
Pattern recognition: how machines find rules in repeated data
Algorithmic thinking: recipes, GPS routes, sorting queues; step-by-step procedures

next_assessment.title: Computational Thinking & AI Foundations
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can decompose a problem, write testable specifications, and describe and evaluate what an AI system can and cannot do.
